recent.interpretation: Response selection stuck — low entropy, low MI. The agent is repeating the same actions with no coherent structure.

Multiple metrics are simultaneously anomalous (tool_entropy, kl_divergence) but the pattern doesn't match any known information-theoretic signature.  This may be a novel failure mode worth investigating.

Perceptual processing disrupted — high KL divergence with high entropy. The action distribution has shifted toward novel, high-diversity behavior. Indicates goal drift or sudden context switch to unfamiliar territory.
